context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies tile.json versioning rules (starting at 0.1.0, not 0.0.1 or 1.0.0), uses the correct name namespace format (steio-skills/<slug>), sets private to true for a pre-production tile, and avoids placeholder text in generated files.

checklist.name: Version starts at 0.1.0
checklist.description: The tile.json version field is exactly '0.1.0' (not '0.0.1', '1.0.0', or any other value)

checklist.name: Name uses steio-skills namespace
checklist.description: The tile.json name field starts with 'steio-skills/' followed by a kebab-case slug (e.g. 'steio-skills/ssl-cert-renewal')

checklist.name: Private flag is true
checklist.description: The tile.json has 'private': true (tile is pre-production and not yet published)

checklist.name: Tile name is kebab-case
checklist.description: The slug portion of the tile.json name field uses only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (kebab-case)

checklist.name: No placeholder text
checklist.description: No generated file contains literal placeholder strings such as '<TBD>', '<TODO>', '<name>', or '<description>'

checklist.name: SKILL.md name is kebab-case
checklist.description: The SKILL.md YAML frontmatter 'name' field is in kebab-case format

checklist.name: SKILL.md description within 1024 chars
checklist.description: The SKILL.md YAML frontmatter 'description' field is present and does not exceed 1024 characters

checklist.name: skills field present in tile.json
checklist.description: tile.json contains at least one of the required fields: 'docs', 'steering', or 'skills'

checklist.name: Version is valid semver
checklist.description: The tile.json version field follows semantic versioning format (e.g. 'X.Y.Z')

checklist.name: SKILL.md has name and description
checklist.description: The SKILL.md YAML frontmatter contains both 'name' and 'description' fields (both are required)
